zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Breteuil於大約1054年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓時，她的父親Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford36歲，母親Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford27歲。她於1075年與Ralph de Gaël II在英國素福爾可艾可寧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1099年7月在巴勒斯坦享年46歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Breteuil于大约1054年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓时，她的父亲Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford36岁，母亲Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford27岁。她于1075年与Ralph de Gaël II在英国素福爾可艾可寧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1099年7月在巴勒斯坦享年46岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Breteuil was born about 1054, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, was 36 and her mother, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, was 27. She married Ralph de Gaël II in 1075, in Exning, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in July 1099, in Palestine, at the age of 46, and was buried in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Breteuil est née environ 1054, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Gaël II en 1075, à Exning, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en juillet 1099, à Palestine, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Breteuil um 1054 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford 36 und ihre Mutter Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford 27. Sie hat 1075 in Exning, Suffolk, England Ralph de Gaël II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Juli 1099 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Breteuil è nata il circa 1054 nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Gaël II nel 1075, nel Exning, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel luglio 1099, nel Palestina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Breteuilが約1054年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンで生まれた時，父Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Herefordは36歳，母Adelise de Tosny Countess of Herefordは27歳であった。1075年にイギリススフォルクエクスニングでRalph de Gaël IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1099年7月にパレスチナで46歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインガeルにて埋葬された。

ko.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 리e
ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Breteuil(이)가 대략 1054년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1075년 영국 수폴크 스닝에서 Ralph de Gaël II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1099년 7월 팔레스타인에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 가e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Breteuil nasceu aproximadamente 1054, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Gaël II em 1075, em Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em julho de 1099, em Palestina, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: лирe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Breteuil родилась около 1054 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Gaël II в 1075 г. в местности экснинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла июль 1099 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности гаeл, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Breteuil nació aproximadamente 1054, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph de Gaël II en 1075, en Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en julio de 1099, en Palestina, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
